3334640.name: Time Jump
3334640.description:
A Casual Action-Adventure

IT'S ABOUT TIME

Play as 20 year old William Roger. It’s 2001 and your University professor has something special to show you!

The Cimera, a time traveling camera. That’s right, you accidentally activate it and get sucked through a time portal and land on a cliched beach, a long time ago, in a land far far away.

EXPLORE YOUR ADVENTURE

Adventure your way through time, discovering your independence, uncovering the secrets of the Time Earth Agency and the Professors plans to dominate time and space. Will you find your way back home before you are history?

Lost, stolen, beaten, eaten and abducted by aliens (well, not that last part), explore your way from the past to the future by adapting to your surroundings, finding the lost Time Pages and a mass of other collectables. Why do you have so much sand in your shoe?

FIND YOUR YOURSELF!

Become a victorious arena champion, bumble your way through a mistaken murder investigation, find love, become a friend, save the village. All this because of a little "accidental" trip to the past.

Level up your skills and fight enemies you never thought you would and of course, battle yourself, again and again and again and again.

There is only one person that can save the universe! Well, maybe 2.

BEWARE THE AGENTS

Escaping from the Cimera Universal Police is only one of your many concerns. Able to track your whereabouts once you activate the Cimera and jump, they stop at nothing to capture you and your precious camera. 

TIME IS OF THE ESSENCE

Up against the clock so to speak. The countdown on the Camera has started. Can you make the next jump before it's too late? Help the local folk. complete missions and make the infernal camera work again. 

Featuring:

  • Styled graphics.

  • Original music and sound.

  • Uncluttered User Interface. (because who wants to sift through a spreadsheet of data)

  • Light Leveling System - Toughness. Independence. Muscle. Endurance.

  • Hybrid style cutscenes.

  • Many references to your favorite movies and games.

  • Oh, yes, and a cool purple backpack.


    Grab your fake leather backpack, navigate through time and space, get home, save the universe and accomplish so much more than you thought you could before time runs out in this, the first chapter of Time Jump.

英语*
